user_query: What motivated Caroline to pursue counseling?

selected_nodes.text: Caroline is planning to continue her education and explore career options in counseling or mental health to support those with similar issues.

selected_nodes.text: Caroline went through a tough process of finding self-acceptance but is now ready to help others who need support.
